title: strip_unsafe_chars misses OSC/DCS terminal escape sequences
description: A peer sends a message containing ESC]0;TITLE BEL (OSC sequence for terminal title injection) or ESC P...ST (DCS sequence). tui/ui.rs strip_unsafe_chars() tracks in_escape by setting it true on ESC and clearing it on the next ASCII letter. OSC terminates with BEL (0x07) not a letter, so in_escape stays true until the 64-char escape-length cap is hit, at which point the BEL and all subsequent characters are emitted verbatim. Any OSC sequence under 64 chars passes through to the terminal, enabling title-bar spoofing and potentially other terminal state manipulation depending on the terminal emulator.
